name: Red Basil Vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the basil leaves from their stalks and place them in a wide mouth quart jar.
2. Heat the vinegar to boiling.
3. Pour the hot vinegar into the jar containing the basil leaves.
4. Cover the jar tightly and store it in a cool, shaded location for 10 days to 2 weeks.
5. After the steeping period, strain the mixture into bottles.
6. Add one or two fresh basil stalks to each bottle (for decoration).
7. Secure the lids tightly on the bottles.
